name: manage_storage
description: Upload, download, list, move, copy, and delete files in Supabase Storage buckets. Supports generating signed URLs for time-limited public access. Each project has its own storage with configurable buckets for organizing files by type or access level.

parameters.name: bucket_id
parameters.description: The name of the storage bucket.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file path within the bucket (can include folder structure).

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file content to upload (as multipart/form-data or binary body).

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: The MIME type of the file being uploaded.

parameters.name: x-upsert
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to overwrite an existing file at the same path.
